originalTitle: Reinforcement learning research with Joseph Suarez
title: Refactoring PufferLib into Eight Clean Files and Moving Code to CUDA
summary: Worked on refactoring PufferLib's codebase from 19 files down to 8, moving all algorithmic code into an algo.cu file and infrastructure into pufferlib.cu. Began cleaning up AI-generated code and ensured end-to-end training runs, with performance at 20 million samples per second.
